_instructions: 1. Go to Make.com > Create a new scenario
2. Click the three-dot menu > Import blueprint
4. Replace all REPLACE_ME placeholders with your real values
name: Za.allyErrands — Dispatch Loop

flow.label: Receive Errand Request
flow._note: Make.com generates a unique URL for this trigger. Paste it into your MAKE_WEBHOOK_URL environment variable.

flow.label: Ping Admin / Phalanx Group
flow._note: Replace GROUP_ID with your WhatsApp group chat ID.

flow.label: Log to Supabase (fallback)
flow._note: Optional: only needed if the Edge Function is not handling the DB insert. Remove this module if using the Edge Function.
